title: Premium Table Tennis Balls 40+mm Professional 3 Star ABS Quality (White/Orange) High-Performance Ping Pong Balls for Indoor & Outdoor Sports Spherical & Celluloid-Free
features: 3 STAR BALLS: 40+mm Professional Players' Ping Pong Balls designed in line with International Standards to ensure each table tennis ball of the quality of hardness, roundness and consistency of bounce.

ABS MATERIAL: A thermoplastic polymer that provides improved impact resistance, toughness, and rigidity in comparison to any other polymers, for Table Tennis Balls. Further, it offers improved roundness and durability over poly balls and is more environmentally friendly.

CELLULOID FREE: Celluloid being a highly inflammable material, makes it arduous and exorbitant to transport and store Ping Pong Ball. Being free of celluloid Ping Pong Balls are ensured of being incombustible.

IDEAL MEAN WEIGHT OF 2.69 - 2.76 GRAMS PER BALL: Heavier Ping Pong Balls tend to be harder to hit over the fence, whereas lighter balls are known to make a game more challenging than it actually would be over a table tennis table. Hence, a mean weight of 2.69 to 2.76 grams is accepted, advised, approved and is in line with international standards.
SPHERICAL: Spherical Table Tennis Balls tend to be much more suited for the game, when in use by the pro table tennis players, to help ensure a better visibility.
description: Introducing our premium Table Tennis Balls, designed to elevate your ping pong game to a whole new level of excitement and precision! Crafted with the utmost care and attention to detail, these top-quality balls are essential for players of all skill levels. Our Table Tennis Balls are made from high-grade materials, ensuring exceptional durability and consistent bounce during every thrilling match. Each ball undergoes strict quality control to meet the highest standards, making them perfect for both recreational play and intense competitions. Whether you're practicing your serves, honing your spins, or engaging in thrilling rallies, our Table Tennis Balls will deliver unparalleled performance. Their 3-star rating guarantees precise flight and excellent spin response, giving you the competitive edge you need to outmaneuver your opponents. Play like a pro with these 3-star ABS Quality table tennis balls that will help unleash the professional in you! Get a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to practice with ping pong balls that are really exceptional. Balls of the highest quality to help you defend against an all-out offensive onslaught whilst playing!
